project_context.archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Modified for Crystal Glassmorphism)
project_context.core_concept: A high-end, immersive style freelancer profile and admin panel using optical clarity glassmorphism. Avoids generic SaaS templates by utilizing bento grids and deep cinematic lighting.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 inside main bento cards. gap-8 between grid items.
layout_and_spacing.form_alignment: Left-align for inputs and text to ensure readability within the glass cards.

glassmorphism_implementation.optical_clarity: The glass must feel like milled crystal. High blur (backdrop-blur-2xl), subtle white inner border (border-white/10), and a dark translucent background (bg-white/5 or bg-black/40 depending on layering).
glassmorphism_implementation.background_lighting: To make the glass refract beautifully, place a fixed absolute glowing orb in the background (e.g., a div with bg-amber-500/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full w-[600px] h-[600px] top-[-10%] left-[-10%]).

component_strategies.inputs: Use Shadcn inputs but override default styles. Background: bg-black/20, Border: border-white/10, Text: text-zinc-50. Must have focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-amber-500.
component_strategies.drag_drop_zone: Large bento glass panel (min-h-[300px]) with dashed border (border-dashed border-white/20). On drag hover: border-amber-500/50 and bg-amber-500/5. Include a centered Lucide icon (e.g., ImagePlus).
component_strategies.title_input: Borderless, huge typography (text-3xl or 4xl). Should feel like a blank canvas rather than a rigid form field.
component_strategies.badges: For selected tags/tools: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-zinc-300.

buttons.primary: Solid bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 rounded-full px-8 py-2.5 font-medium hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: Glassmorphism pill: rounded-full px-6 py-2 border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white

component_strategies.shadcn_overrides: For Select, Dropdown, and Calendar: The popover content MUST be dark/glass (bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10 text-zinc-100) to prevent glaring white popups on a dark theme.

structure.header: Sticky header (z-50) using crystal glass style. Contains Logo/Giovani Amorim, Breadcrumbs (Portfolio / Add Project), and 'Publish Project' CTA button.
structure.layout: 12-column Bento Grid. col-span-12 lg:col-span-8 for Main Content (Title, Description, Media Drag & Drop). col-span-12 lg:col-span-4 for Settings Sidebar (Cover Image, Categories, Tags, Tools, Visibility).

page_specific_instructions.testing: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='title-input', data-testid='upload-zone', data-testid='publish-btn', data-testid='visibility-toggle').

video_sizing_rules.overview: Videos must be fully responsive and fit without distortion. Different rules apply for different contexts.

url_videos.description: YouTube, Vimeo, and other streaming services use 16:9 aspect ratio
url_videos.responsive: 100% width, container-width height (calculated from aspect ratio)
url_videos.max_height: No max height in editor to allow full preview

uploaded_videos.description: Supports any video format including vertical/story format
uploaded_videos.responsive: Width: 100% of container, Height: auto (maintains original aspect ratio)
uploaded_videos.max_height: 80vh to prevent overflow on large desktop screens
uploaded_videos.object_contain: Ensures no distortion - video fits completely within bounds

url_videos.container: relative bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden w-full with maxHeight: '80vh'
url_videos.description: Consistent with editor but with visual containment
url_videos.mobile: On mobile viewport, respects viewport height but maintains 16:9 ratio

uploaded_videos.description: Same as editor - preserves original aspect ratio
uploaded_videos.mobile: Adapts to mobile width (usually 100vw - padding), maintains aspect

technical_implementation.aspect_ratio_css: Use style={{ aspectRatio: '16 / 9' }} for standard videos
technical_implementation.max_height_constraint: max-h-[80vh] applies to both editor and portfolio views to prevent giant videos on ultrawide displays
technical_implementation.object_contain: Applied to uploaded videos to prevent distortion when aspect ratios don't match container
technical_implementation.container_background: bg-black for video containers to prevent white flash and maintain professional appearance
technical_implementation.responsive_breakpoints: Mobile: 100% width minus padding. Desktop: same, constrained by max-height

vertical_videos_story_format.note: Vertical videos (story format) will display with aspect ratio that matches their original proportions if using object-contain
vertical_videos_story_format.behavior: Will be smaller width on desktop (portrait box centered in container) but won't distort
vertical_videos_story_format.recommendation: If vertical videos should take more width, consider accepting a custom aspectRatio setting in block.settings

images.description: Abstract colorful shapes for background blur/texture. Use as a hidden/blurred element if organic mesh is not built with CSS.
Sample uploaded project cover image to preview within the form layout.

technical_rules.framework: React JS (.jsx or .js) + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI
technical_rules.animations: Use Framer Motion for entrance staggers on the bento grid items, and subtle scale effects on button hover.
technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast on glass panels is high. Inputs must have clear focus states.
